seed.content: {"url":"https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Closure_(computer_programming)","title":"Closure (computer programming) — Wikipedia","text":"In programming languages, a closure, also lexical closure or function closure, is a technique for implementing lexically scoped name binding in a language with first-class functions. args.summary: A closure is a function bundled with the lexical environment it was defined in — so it can access variables from its enclosing scope even after that scope has returned.
